'''Uluu''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Zug system/Legends|Zug system]]. It was the farthest planet away from the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] [[Star/Legends|star]], [[Zug]], and because of this, it was extremely cold. Uluu possessed a single [[Moon/Legends|natural satellite]].<ref name="Aargau" />

==Behind the scenes==
Uluu was first mentioned briefly in "Three Simple Laws," the first part of the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' article series ''[[Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs]]'', which was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on the [[Wizards.com]] website in [[2003]].<ref name="Aargau" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Zug [[Star system/Legends|system]], thereby including Uluu, in grid square L-10.<ref name="TEA" />
